message:
fix(security): ct_eq timing fix, expiry enforcement, path traversal guard, ledger binding check

key_role_separation.rs (bd-1wcje):
- Replace == with ct_eq_bytes for public key comparison (timing side-channel)
- Enforce max_validity_seconds in verify_role() — keys now expire fail-closed
- Add KeyExpired error variant + 3 regression tests (62 tests pass)

manifest.rs (bd-3m6dz):
- Add validate_entrypoint_path() rejecting ../ traversal, absolute paths, backslashes
- Runs after engine validation to preserve existing error precedence
- 4 regression tests (54 tests pass)

zk_attestation.rs (bd-3vszr):
- verify_proof() now checks attestation exists in ledger before verification
- Prevents forged attestation IDs from being verified as legitimate
- 2 regression tests (42 tests pass)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
